source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 giu3 zou6
cards.english: My name is Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ji4 keoi5 zau6 hai6 ngo5 sai3 lou2
cards.english: And this is my little brother, George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau6 hai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2
cards.english: This is Mummy Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: keoi5 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1
cards.english: He is Daddy Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6
cards.english: I am Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: bei3 mat6
cards.english: [Secret]

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 豬太太幫Peppa整咗個特別嘅盒仔喎
cards.jyutping: zyu1 taai3 taai2 bong1 zing2 zo2 go3 dak6 bit6 ge3 hap6 zai2 wo3
cards.english: Mummy Pig made a special box for Peppa!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ni1 go3 hap6 hai6 sung3 bei2 nei5 gaa4
cards.english: Peppa, this box is for you.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: do1 ze6 maa1 mi4
cards.english: Thank you, Mummy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ni1 go3 hai6 bei3 mat6 hap6 zai2
cards.english: This is a secret box.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: bei2 nei5 fong3 di1 bei3 mat6 jap6 heoi3 gaa4
cards.english: It's for you to put your secrets inside.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 唔知我可以放啲咩入去呢
cards.jyutping: m4 zi1 ngo5 ho2 ji5 fong3 di1 me1 jap6 heoi3 ne1
cards.english: I wonder what I can put inside?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei4 joeng6 je5 nei5 zi6 gei2 kyut3 ding6 laa3
cards.english: That's for you to decide, Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ni1 go3 hai6 nei5 ge3 bei3 mat6 hap6 zai2
cards.english: This is your secret box.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zi1 dou3 fong3 di1 me1 jap6 heoi3 laa3
cards.english: I know what to put in it now!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hou2 aa3 m4 sai2 waa6 ngo5 ting1 gaa4 wo3
cards.english: Okay, you don't have to tell me.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 m4 wui6 waa6 bei2 nei5 ting1 gaa4
cards.english: I won't tell you.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: waak6 ze2 hai6 tung4 maai4 de1 dei6 ting1
cards.english: Or George and Daddy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ni1 go3 hai6 bei3 mat6
cards.english: This is a seee...cret.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ni1 go3 hai6 ngo5 ge3 bei3 mat6 hap6 zai2
cards.english: George, this is my secret box.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: keoi5 ji4 gaa1 hai6 hung1 ge3
cards.english: It's empty now.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 但係我要揾啲嘢…放入個盒入面
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 ngo5 jiu3 wan2 di1 je5 fong3 jap6 go3 haap6 jap6 min6
cards.english: But I need to find something... to put in the box.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: soeng2 bong1 aa3
cards.english: George wants to help Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 唔得啊，等我可以知道個盒放啲咩㗎咋
cards.jyutping: m4 dak1 aa3 dang2 ngo5 ho2 ji5 zi1 dou3 go3 haap6 fong3 di1 me1 ga3 zaa3
cards.english: No, wait until I know what to put in the box.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 ji4 gaa1 ceot1 heoi3 sin1 laa1
cards.english: You go out first.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: jan1 wai6 ngo5 jiu3 hai2 dou6 gaan2 je5 aa3
cards.english: Because I need to choose something here.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: Peppa準備揀一啲秘密嘅嘢放入個盒度喎
cards.jyutping: zeon2 bei6 gaan2 jat1 di1 bei3 mat6 ge3 je5 fong3 jap6 go3 hap6 dou6 wo3
cards.english: Peppa is getting ready to choose some secret things to put in the box.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 而家我嘅秘密盒仔放咗嘢喇
cards.jyutping: ji4 gaa1 ngo5 ge3 bei3 mat6 hap6 zai2 fong3 zo2 je5 laa3
cards.english: Now my secret box has something in it.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 m4 ho2 ji5 tau1 mong6 go3 haap6 gaa4
cards.english: George, you can't peek at the box.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: George好想知道Peppa個盒放咗啲咩啊
cards.jyutping: hou2 soeng2 zi1 dou3 go3 hap6 fong3 zo2 di1 me1 aa3
cards.english: George really wants to know what Peppa put in the box.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 如果你想嘅，你可以試下估𠸏
cards.jyutping: jyu4 gwo2 nei5 soeng2 ge3 nei5 ho2 ji5 si3 haa6 gu2 ge2
cards.english: If you want, you can try guessing.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hung2 lung4
cards.english: Dinosaur.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: George覺得Peppa 放咗一隻恐龍入個盒度啊
cards.jyutping: gok3 dak1 fong3 zo2 jat1 zek3 hung2 lung4 jap6 go3 hap6 dou6 aa3
cards.english: George thinks Peppa put a dinosaur in the box.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: juk1
cards.english: Oh, George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 你見到啲咩都淨係識得講「恐龍」𠸏？
cards.jyutping: nei5 gin3 dou2 di1 me1 dou1 zing6 hai6 sik1 dak1 gong2 hung2 lung4 ge2
cards.english: Is "dinosaur" all you can say when you see something?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zung2 zi1 ne1
cards.english: Anyway.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 恐龍咁大隻根本放唔到入個盒度㗎
cards.jyutping: hung2 lung4 gam3 daai6 zek3 gan1 bun2 fong3 m4 dou3 jap6 go3 hap6 dou6 gaa4
cards.english: A dinosaur is so big, it can't fit in the box.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: George估唔到Peppa個盒入面有啲咩啊
cards.jyutping: gu2 m4 dou3 go3 haap6 jap6 min6 jau5 di1 me1 aa3
cards.english: George can't guess what's inside Peppa's box.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 豬先生喺度打掃緊幅畫
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 hai2 dou6 daa2 sou3 gan2 fuk1 waak6
cards.english: Mr. Pig is cleaning the painting.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 爹哋，呢個係我嘅秘密盒仔
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 ni1 go3 hai6 ngo5 ge3 bei3 mat6 hap6 zai2
cards.english: Daddy, this is my secret box.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hai6 maa1 mi4 zing2 bei2 ngo5 gaa4
cards.english: Mommy made it for me.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: mat1 gam3 hou2 aa3
cards.english: Oh, is that so good? Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: jap6 bin6 jau5 me1 aa3
cards.english: What's inside?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ni1 go3 hai6 bei3 mat6
cards.english: It's a secret.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: jau5 si3 gwo3 gu2
cards.english: George tried to guess.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 keoi5 gu2 m4 zung1 aa3
cards.english: But he couldn't guess it.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 jau6 ho2 ji5 gu2 haa6 maa1
cards.english: Can I try to guess?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ho2 ji5 aa3
cards.english: Yes, you can.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 你係咪放咗我副眼鏡入去啊？
cards.jyutping: nei5 hai6 mai6 fong3 zo2 ngo5 fu3 ngaan5 geng3 jap6 heoi3 aa3
cards.english: Did you put my glasses in there?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: m4 hai6 aa3
cards.english: No.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 mai5 daai3 zyu6 nei5 fu3 ngaan5 geng3 lo1
cards.english: Then just wear your glasses.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: jau6 hai6 wo3
cards.english: Oh, right.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 爹哋好傻啊，你要認真啲去估㗎
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 hou2 so4 aa3 nei5 jiu3 jing6 zan1 di1 heoi3 gu2 gaa4
cards.english: Daddy is so silly, you need to guess more seriously.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 係噉好啦，你放咗媽咪對鞋入去？
cards.jyutping: hai6 gam2 hou2 laa1 nei5 fong3 zo2 maa1 mi4 deoi3 haai4 jap6 heoi3
cards.english: Okay then, did you put Mummy's shoes in there?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: m4 hai6
cards.english: No.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 你已經用晒所有機會再去估喇
cards.jyutping: nei5 ji5 ging1 jung6 saai3 so2 jau5 gei1 wui6 zoi3 heoi3 gu2 laa3
cards.english: You've used up all your chances to guess.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hou2 zung1 ji3 bei3 mat6
cards.english: Peppa loves secrets.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 媽咪，冇人估到個盒入面係咩啊
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 mou5 jan4 gu2 dou3 go3 haap6 jap6 min6 hai6 me1 aa3
cards.english: Mummy, no one can guess what's in the box.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: juk1 nei5 ling1 zyu6 di1 me1 aa3
cards.english: Oh, George, what are you holding?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dou1 zing2 zo2 go3 hap6 bei2 aa3
cards.english: I made a box for George too.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: keoi5 fong3 zo2 di1 bei3 mat6 jap6 heoi3 aa3
cards.english: He put some secrets inside.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 只有George先知道入邊有啲咩㗎
cards.jyutping: zi2 jau5 sin1 zi1 dou3 jap6 bin6 jau5 di1 me1 gaa4
cards.english: Only George knows what's inside.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: Peppa想知道George個盒入邊有啲咩啊
cards.jyutping: soeng2 zi1 dou3 go3 haap6 jap6 bin6 jau5 di1 me1 aa3
cards.english: Peppa wants to know what's inside George's box.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 裏面一定係George嘅玩具恐龍啊
cards.jyutping: leoi5 min6 jat1 ding6 hai6 ge3 wun6 geoi6 hung2 lung4 aa3
cards.english: It must be George's toy dinosaur inside.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: m4 hai6
cards.english: No.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: George嘅玩具恐龍唔喺個盒入邊喇
cards.jyutping: ge3 wun6 geoi6 hung2 lung4 m4 hai2 go3 haap6 jap6 bin6 laa3
cards.english: George's toy dinosaur isn't in the box anymore.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 真係太難估喇，我唔估喇
cards.jyutping: zan1 hai6 taai3 naan4 gu2 laa3 ngo5 m4 gu2 laa3
cards.english: It's too hard to guess, I give up.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: Peppa已經冇之前咁鍾意秘密喇
cards.jyutping: ji5 ging1 mou5 zi1 cin4 gam3 zung1 ji3 bei3 mat6 laa3
cards.english: Peppa doesn't like secrets as much as before.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 我諗呢，如果你畀George 睇下你個盒有啲咩嘅
cards.jyutping: ngo5 nam2 ne1 jyu4 gwo2 nei5 bei2 tai2 haa6 nei5 go3 haap6 jau5 di1 me1 ge3
cards.english: I think, if you let George see what's in your box

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 佢都會畀你睇佢個盒有啲咩㗎
cards.jyutping: keoi5 dou1 wui6 bei2 nei5 tai2 keoi5 go3 haap6 jau5 di1 me1 gaa4
cards.english: He'll let you see what's in his box too.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hou2 laa1
cards.english: Okay

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 ngo5 dei6 jiu3 jat1 cai4 zou6 gaa4
cards.english: But we have to do it together

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zan1 hai6 go3 hou2 zyu2 ji3 aa3
cards.english: That's a really good idea

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 我數到三 你哋就喺盒度拎一樣嘢出嚟
cards.jyutping: ngo5 sou3 dou3 saam1 nei5 dei6 zau6 hai2 hap6 dou6 ling1 jat1 joeng6 je5 ceot1 lei4
cards.english: I'll count to three, then you guys take one thing out of the box

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zeon2 bei6 hou2 mei6 aa3
cards.english: Are you ready?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: dak1 laa3
cards.english: Okay

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: jat1 ji6 saam1
cards.english: One, two, three!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: fong3 zo2 go3 gu2
cards.english: George put in a drum

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ne1 zau6 fong3 zo2 go3 laa3 baa1
cards.english: And Peppa put in a trumpet

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hou2 hou2 ting1 aa3
cards.english: That sounds really good

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hai6 aa3 zan1 hai6 hou2 hou2 ting1 aa3
cards.english: Yes, it really sounds good.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 你哋仲有冇其他秘密嘢啊？
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 zung6 jau5 mou5 kei4 taa1 bei3 mat6 je5 aa3
cards.english: Do you guys have any other secrets?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: George放咗個奶油冬甩入去啊
cards.jyutping: fong3 zo2 go3 naai5 jau4 dung1 lat1 jap6 heoi3 aa3
cards.english: George put a cream donut in there.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 go3 hap6 hai6 hung1 gaa4
cards.english: But Peppa's box is empty.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 mou5 fong3 kei4 taa1 je5 laa3
cards.english: I didn't put anything else in.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hou2 coi2 ngo5 dou1 jau5 zek1
cards.english: Luckily, I have some too.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: lai4 laa1 jat1 cai4 sik6 aa1
cards.english: Come on, let's eat together.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: George、Peppa 豬太太同豬先生都好鍾意奶油冬甩㗎
cards.jyutping: zyu1 taai3 taai2 tung4 zyu1 sin1 saang1 dou1 hou2 zung1 ji3 naai5 jau4 dung1 lat1 gaa4
cards.english: George, Peppa, Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig all like cream donuts.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 mou5 jat1 go3 bei3 mat6 hap6 zai2
cards.english: I don't have a secret box.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 但係我知道有個好地方收埋呢個奶油冬甩
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 ngo5 zi1 dou3 jau5 go3 hou2 dei6 fong1 sau1 maai4 ni1 go3 naai5 jau4 dung1 lat1
cards.english: But I know a good place to hide this cream donut.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 gu2 hai2 bin1 dou6
cards.english: Where do you think it is?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 你要將佢收埋喺…雪櫃入面？
cards.jyutping: nei5 jiu3 zoeng1 keoi5 sau1 maai4 hai2 syut3 gwai6 jap6 min6
cards.english: You need to hide it in... the fridge?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 唔係，係一個更特別嘅地方
cards.jyutping: m4 hai6 hai6 jat1 go3 gang3 dak6 bit6 ge3 dei6 fong1
cards.english: No, it's a more special place.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zau6 hai6 ngo5 go3 tou5
cards.english: It's in my stomach.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hou2 hou2 mei6 aa3
cards.english: So delicious.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 我都要將我個冬甩收喺我個肚度
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dou1 jiu3 zoeng1 ngo5 go3 dung1 lat1 sau1 hai2 ngo5 go3 tou5 dou6
cards.english: I want to hide my donut in my stomach too.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E13 Secrets［祕密］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dou1 jiu3 aa3
cards.english: Me too.
